description: Read alevin output files and convert them to anndata (.h5ad) or loom (.loom) format for downstream analysis. Designed to convert Alevin Velocity quantification into a compatible format for scVelo.
author: Anthony S. Castanza;UCSD-MesirovLab
plan:
## Convert.Alevin GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
Convert.Alevin is a GenePattern module that Read alevin output files and convert them to anndata (.h5ad) or loom (.loom) format for downstream analysis. Designed to convert Alevin Velocity quantification into a compatible format for scVelo.

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 4 parameters:
- Required: Alevin.Quants, Merge, Out.Type
- Optional: Features

### 3. Command Line
```
python3 /build/alevin.vpolo.py -i <Alevin.Quants> -f <Features> -m <Merge> -o <Out.Type>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: genepattern/convert_alevin\:v1

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: Alevin.Quants
parameters.description: Alevin output directories. Files must be in .tar.gz format, and have unique names.

parameters.name: Features
parameters.description: A tab delimited file containing the list of spliced gene ids in column 1, the unspliced gene ids in column 2, and gene names (symbols) in column 3. (From PreprocessVelocityTranscriptome, or manually created)

parameters.name: Merge
parameters.description: Combine multiple Alevin runs into a single output object (True), or output them individually (false).

parameters.name: Out.Type
parameters.description: Output alevin results as anndata (.h5ad) or loom (.loom)
